snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.description:

This pure romantic Punjabi track, sung from a male perspective, reflects the beauty of keeping love private to protect it from the evil eye. snippet.title: Don't Mess With Bober - Official Release Date Trailer
snippet.description:
Check out the Release Date Trailer for Don't Mess With Bober, a first-person walking simulation game developed by Peace_Studio and DonCorsaire. Players will assume the role of Matthew when a beaver seeks revenge for Matthew ruining his dam. Survive the nightmare that awaits in Don't Mess With Bober, launching on March 13 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch, with the game being available now on PC (Steam).

snippet.title: M8 vs. AG — VALORANT Masters Santiago — Playoffs Stage
snippet.description:
From February 28th to March 15th, the world’s top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters Santiago, the first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: The Greatest Solo EVER? Lynyrd Skynyrd - Free Bird (Live 1977)
snippet.description:
The Greatest Solo EVER? Lynyrd Skynyrd - Free Bird (Live 1977)

🔔 Subscribe to Roadtrip Rock channel: https://bit.ly/4km8pvz

Experience the definitive live performance of the ultimate southern rock anthem as Lynyrd Skynyrd takes the stage in 1977. This legendary recording captures the band at the height of their powers, featuring the iconic triple-guitar assault that defined a generation. Witness the raw energy and soaring melodies of a masterpiece that remains a cornerstone of rock history.

🎤 Ronnie Van Zant
🎸 Gary Rossington, Allen Collins, Steve Gaines
🎸 Leon Wilkeson
🎹 Billy Powell
🥁 Artimus Pyle

📅 July 2, 1977

The studio version of Free Bird reached number 19 on the Billboard Hot 100 and has since become a staple of classic rock radio worldwide. The debut album featuring this track has been certified 2x Platinum by the RIAA, selling over 2 million copies in the United States alone. It consistently ranks in the top 5 of Guitar World's 100 Greatest Guitar Solos of all time.

Did You Know?
• The song was originally written in 1970 but the band waited years to record it until they felt the arrangement was perfect.
• The famous fast-tempo guitar solo at the end was added to the live set to give lead singer Ronnie Van Zant a chance to rest his voice.
• This 1977 performance at the Oakland Coliseum is widely considered one of the most iconic captures of the band before the tragic plane crash later that year.

#LynyrdSkynyrd #SouthernRock #LiveConcert #FreeBird #RockHistory #ClassicRock

Welcome to Roadtrip Rock, the home of high-octane live performances and stadium-shaking anthems designed to be played loud. We feature the hardest-hitting concerts from rock history, capturing the energy of the highway and the roar of the crowd. Whether you love classic rock giants or high-energy blues, this channel fuels your journey with unforgettable archival footage. Hit subscribe and turn the volume up to eleven.

snippet.title: Dogstar - All In Now (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
New album All In Now out May 29th: https://dogstar.lnk.to/allinnow
Order exclusive signed vinyl from our official Shop now: https://lnk.to/DogstarStore

"All In Now" Lyrics:
You keep touchin’ you’ll get burned
You’d think by now that you’d have learned
That there’s more
Here than you can handle
You keep betting everything
Always try your best to please
But sometimes things are bigger than us

Run run away
From what holds you tight
And dims your light
There’s other ways
To keep you warm at night
Without the fight

No one saved your life tonight
It’s up to you to do what’s right
By your heart whatever’s left
You can flip it upside down
If it helps you get from lost to found
And the world
Will be ridin’ by your side

There’s nothin’ to lose
You’ve gone all in now
I think you’d know by now
If this was what it should be
The thoughts of breaking free
Wouldn’t come to be
